30006344.title: George Bennett (murderer)
30006344.extract: George Bennett (died 23 July 1880) was a Canadian newspaper employee who was convicted of the murder of George Brown, publisher of the Toronto Globe. He insisted until the day of his execution that he had not intended to kill Brown.
